text.content:
The Signature Ledger is the campaign planning hub. Open it with the Quartermaster button in the Items Directory header. It has six tabs.

Signatures

Per-character milestone timelines. Drag items from compendiums onto a character's milestone slots to plan their signature gear across the campaign. Each character has a budget of four planned items. A power score tracks whether each character is running hot, warm, even, cool, or cold relative to the party average.

Scroll Plan

A milestone grid for planned scroll drops. Three slots per milestone. Pinned scrolls bypass the Scroll Forge's jitter and appear exactly as placed. Unpinned slots randomise from the configured spell sources. The party's median level band shows as a reach bar so you can see whether a scroll is appropriate.

Party Shelf

Party-wide item planning that is not tied to a specific character. Three slots per milestone. Items can be randomised from your configured compendiums or pinned manually. If an item already exists in a party member's inventory, the slot shows it as delivered.

Cursed Pool

Tier-lane layout for cursed items. Two slots per milestone for planned curse injection points. A pool browser lets you filter by curse type and drag items into lanes. Source management shows whether items come from the SRD pool or from Ionrift Cursewright.

Ban List

Drag items from compendiums onto the ban list to exclude them from all cache generation. Useful for items that break your campaign or that you have already placed manually.

Progression Advisory

A read-only dashboard. Power score deviation per character, disparity flags when the gap between strongest and weakest is too wide, and budget pips showing how many signature slots are filled. Use it to spot imbalances before they reach the table.
